Package umm.digiquilt.xmlsaveload.handlers

Class Summary
BlockHandler XML handler which can load one Block from XML.
ChallengeFileHandler Parses a list of challenges.
ChallengeHandler Parses a single Challenge.
DelegatingHandler A ContentHandler which allows multiple ContentHandlers to also get SAX events.
DigiQuiltSAXHandler  
FractionChallengeHandler Handles parsing of the FractionChallenge tag, creating a FractionChallenge object when finished.
GridHandler XML handler which loads a Grid from XML.
HistoryHandler Handle the History tag.
LineHandler XML handler to load a single grid line from XML.
PatchHandler XML Handler to load a single Patch from XML.
TextHandler An XML handler for simple tags which only contain text, such as: <example>This text will be collected by TextHandler</example>
